# Milestone

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Milestone;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Milestone { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
signpost, direction, right, east, forward, version control, waypoint

## Categories
arrows, navigation, development, gaming
